meaning: adj.目不转睛的,凝视的,显眼的,(毛发)竖立的
examples: He was staring at her with cold eyes.
Alice stood staring into the distance.
He sipped his drink, staring intensely at me.
An elephant suddenly surged out of the foliage about 20m away, staring directly at us.
He was staring intently at a mother warthog, her four tiny piglets foraging nearby.
